items.title: Resolution Thresholds in VLM Detection of Harmful ASCII Art Across Construction Modes and Languages
items.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as content moderation tools, yet they remain vulnerable to jailbreak attacks in which harmful text is visually encoded as ASCII art. This can allow inappropriate or harmful content to bypass moderation systems. To address this vulnerability, this paper investigates how image resolution affects VLM detection of harmful ASCII art across eight character construction modes (L1-L8), ranging from dense block characters to word-embedded designs. We evaluate eight state-of-the-art VLMs on English and Chinese corpora using a pipeline that generates ASCII art images at ten resolution scales, probing whether a consistent detection-failure threshold exists across models, modes, and languages. Results indicate that detection rates decline sharply above certain resolution thresholds, and that word-based modes are the most resistant to detection across the full resolution range. These findings reveal a systematic vulnerability in VLM-based content moderation systems and motivate resolution-aware evaluation standards.
items.llm_evidence_en: jailbreak via ASCII art and detection threshold analysis
items.llm_evidence_cn: 通过ASCII艺术进行越狱攻击及检测阈值分析
items.llm_evidence: 通过ASCII艺术进行越狱攻击及检测阈值分析
items.canonical_evidence: 通过ASCII艺术进行越狱攻击及检测阈值分析
items.llm_tldr_en: Investigates how image resolution affects VLM detection of harmful ASCII art, revealing a consistent detection-failure threshold across models and languages.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对大视觉语言模型（VLM）内容审核的漏洞，研究了图像分辨率对检测有害ASCII艺术的影响。通过八种字符构造模式和两种语言，在十种分辨率尺度下评估了八个VLM，发现存在一致的检测失败阈值。实验表明，特定分辨率下有害内容可轻易绕过审核，为越狱攻击提供了新的维度。
items.llm_tldr: 该论文针对大视觉语言模型（VLM）内容审核的漏洞，研究了图像分辨率对检测有害ASCII艺术的影响。通过八种字符构造模式和两种语言，在十种分辨率尺度下评估了八个VLM，发现存在一致的检测失败阈值。实验表明，特定分辨率下有害内容可轻易绕过审核，为越狱攻击提供了新的维度。

items.title: Why Struggle with Continuous Latents? Interpretable Discrete Latent Reasoning via Rendered Compression
items.abstract: Large language models achieve high reasoning performance via explicit chain-of-thought and reinforcement learning, but require long output sequences and extended inference time. Latent reasoning reduces this cost by shifting computation into a latent space; however, continuous latent methods are hard to train, suffering from unstable and uninterpretable reasoning trajectories. We argue these issues stem from a misalignment between continuous-space reasoning and discrete symbolic supervision, as continuous states lack explicit anchors for step-by-step alignment. To resolve this, we propose \textbf{Discrete Latent Reasoning~(DLR)}, the first method that converts continuous latent states into explicit discrete tokens. Inspired by render-based compression, we render textual chains of thought into images, extract visual features, and construct a discrete latent vocabulary via clustering-based fine-tuning. Expanding the vocabulary and output head enables standard autoregressive modeling over both natural language and latent tokens, supporting pretraining alignment, SFT, and RL. Experiments on five reasoning benchmarks and two model series~(Qwen3-VL and LLaMA-3) confirm that \textbf{DLR} outperforms prior latent reasoning baselines with up to \textbf{20$\times$ compression}. Furthermore, the learned latent trajectories retain an interpretable semantic structure. Overall, discrete latent tokens provide a controllable and interpretable basis for efficient latent reasoning.
items.llm_evidence_en: improving reasoning efficiency via discrete latent reasoning, reducing long output sequences
items.llm_evidence_cn: 通过离散潜在推理提高推理效率，减少长输出序列
items.llm_evidence: 通过离散潜在推理提高推理效率，减少长输出序列
items.canonical_evidence: 通过离散潜在推理提高推理效率，减少长输出序列
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Discrete Latent Reasoning (DLR) that converts continuous latents into discrete tokens for stable and interpretable latent reasoning, reducing inference cost.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文指出现有连续潜在推理方法面临训练不稳定和推理轨迹不可解释的问题，源于连续空间与离散监督的对齐缺失。提出离散潜在推理（DLR），将连续潜在状态显式转化为离散token，从而利用大语言模型的离散推理能力。实验表明，DLR在多个推理任务上实现了更高的效率与可解释性，同时缩短了推理序列长度，显著降低了计算开销。
items.llm_tldr: 该论文指出现有连续潜在推理方法面临训练不稳定和推理轨迹不可解释的问题，源于连续空间与离散监督的对齐缺失。提出离散潜在推理（DLR），将连续潜在状态显式转化为离散token，从而利用大语言模型的离散推理能力。实验表明，DLR在多个推理任务上实现了更高的效率与可解释性，同时缩短了推理序列长度，显著降低了计算开销。

items.title: EntroRouter: Learning Efficient Model Routing via Entropy Regulation
items.abstract: Model routing balances solution accuracy and computational cost by selecting among models of varying capabilities. While recent multi-round frameworks interleave reasoning and planning, we identify a structural failure mode termed Trust Region Collapse. We demonstrate that the deep coupling of reasoning and routing, exacerbated by the dominance of strong pre-training priors under sparse supervision, leads to degenerate local optima where capable experts are systematically suppressed. To decouple these processes, we propose $\textbf{EntroRouter}$, a single-round routing framework that treats entropy regulation as a core objective. We first initialize the policy via Soft Supervision, fitting a distribution of suitable models to establish a high-entropy prior for exploration. Subsequently, we stabilize Reinforcement Learning using a Soft Anchor, which utilizes offline capability estimates to orchestrate controlled entropy contraction within a safe trust region. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EntroRouter retains 98.3% of the strongest expert's accuracy while reducing computational costs by 48.25%.
items.llm_evidence_en: model routing for efficient inference via entropy regulation
items.llm_evidence_cn: 通过熵调节实现高效模型路由
items.llm_evidence: 通过熵调节实现高效模型路由
items.canonical_evidence: 通过熵调节实现高效模型路由
items.llm_tldr_en: EntroRouter uses entropy regulation to learn efficient model routing, balancing accuracy and cost, avoiding trust region collapse.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 论文提出EntroRouter框架，利用熵调节作为核心目标学习高效模型路由，解决多轮路由中的信任区域坍缩问题。通过软监督初始化策略，建立高熵先验，有效抑制了强预训练先验在稀疏监督下对专家模型的系统性压制，从而在保持准确性的同时降低计算成本。
items.llm_tldr: 论文提出EntroRouter框架，利用熵调节作为核心目标学习高效模型路由，解决多轮路由中的信任区域坍缩问题。通过软监督初始化策略，建立高熵先验，有效抑制了强预训练先验在稀疏监督下对专家模型的系统性压制，从而在保持准确性的同时降低计算成本。
